55.name: Dragonmaw Armor Kit
55.text: Permanently increase the intellect by 8 and spell power by 6 of an item worn on the chest, legs, hands or feet.  Only usable on items level 60 and above.

818.name: Basic Campfire
818.text: Builds a campfire that increases the spirits of those nearby by 4 and allows cooking.

2329.name: Elixir of Lion's Strength
2329.text: With the mixture of Snakeroot for physical improvement and crushed Silverleaf for enhancement, a potion to to bring out one's inner lion is brewed.

2657.name: Smelt Copper
2657.text: Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of copper ore into a copper bar.  Smelting copper requires a forge.

2658.name: Smelt Silver
2658.text: Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of silver ore into a silver bar.  Smelting silver requires a forge.

2659.name: Smelt Bronze
2659.text: Allows the miner to smelt a tin bar and a copper bar together into two bronze bars.  Smelting bronze requires a forge.

2835.name: Deadly Poison
2835.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy for 36 Nature damage over 12 sec.  Stacks up to 5 times on a single target.  60 charges.

2837.name: Deadly Poison II
2837.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy for 52 Nature damage over 12 sec.  Stacks up to 5 times on a single target.  75 charges.

3230.name: Elixir of Minor Agility
3230.text: With  Swiftthistle for speed and crushed Silverleaf for enhancement, a potion to to enchance ones natural agility is brewed.

3304.name: Smelt Tin
3304.text: Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of tin ore into a tin bar.  Smelting tin requires a forge.

3307.name: Smelt Iron
3307.text: Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of iron ore into an iron bar.  Smelting iron requires a forge.

3308.name: Smelt Gold
3308.text: Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of gold ore into a gold bar.  Smelting gold requires a forge.

3420.name: Crippling Poison
3420.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, slowing their movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

3421.name: Crippling Poison II
3421.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, slowing their movement speed by 60% for 12 sec.

3569.name: Smelt Steel
3569.text: Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of iron ore and a lump of coal together into a steel bar.  Smelting steel requires a forge.

3933.name: Small Seaforium Charge
3933.text: A Small Seaforium charge which is enough to blast open some doors.

3978.name: Standard Scope
3978.text: An improved scope that increases the damage done with your bow or gun.

5763.name: Mind-numbing Poison
5763.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 20% chance of poisoning the enemy, increasing their casting time by 40% for 10 sec.  50 charges.

6510.name: Blinding Powder
6510.text: Create the reagent for the Blind ability.

8681.name: Instant Poison
8681.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 20% chance of poisoning the enemy which instantly inflicts 19 to 25 Nature damage.  40 charges.

8687.name: Instant Poison II
8687.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 20% chance of poisoning the enemy which instantly inflicts 30 to 38 Nature damage.  55 charges.

8691.name: Instant Poison III
8691.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 20% chance of poisoning the enemy which instantly inflicts 44 to 56 Nature damage.  70 charges.

8694.name: Mind-numbing Poison II
8694.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 20% chance of poisoning the enemy, increasing their casting time by 50% for 12 sec.  75 charges.

8768.name: Iron Belt Buckle
8768.text: Creates two Iron Buckles that are used by other trade skills.

10097.name: Smelt Mithril
10097.text: Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of mithril ore into a mithril bar.  Smelting mithril requires a forge.

10098.name: Smelt Truesilver
10098.text: Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of truesilver ore into a truesilver bar.  Smelting truesilver requires a forge.

11341.name: Instant Poison IV
11341.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 20% chance of poisoning the enemy which instantly inflicts 67 to 85 Nature damage.  85 charges.

11342.name: Instant Poison V
11342.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 20% chance of poisoning the enemy which instantly inflicts 92 to 118 Nature damage.  100 charges.

11343.name: Instant Poison VI
11343.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 20% chance of poisoning the enemy which instantly inflicts 112 to 148 Nature damage.  115 charges.

11357.name: Deadly Poison III
11357.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy for 80 Nature damage over 12 sec.  Stacks up to 5 times on a single target.  90 charges.

11358.name: Deadly Poison IV
11358.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy for 108 Nature damage over 12 sec.  Stacks up to 5 times on a single target.  105 charges.

11400.name: Mind-numbing Poison III
11400.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 20% chance of poisoning the enemy, increasing their casting time by 60% for 14 sec.  100 charges.

11479.name: Transmute: Iron to Gold
11479.text: Turns a bar of Iron into a bar of Gold.

11480.name: Transmute: Mithril to Truesilver
11480.text: Turns a bar of Mithril into a bar of Truesilver.

13220.name: Wound Poison
13220.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing all healing effects used on them by 5% for 15 sec.

13228.name: Wound Poison II
13228.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing all healing effects used on them by 75 for 15 sec.

13229.name: Wound Poison III
13229.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing all healing effects used on them by 105 for 15 sec.

13230.name: Wound Poison IV
13230.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing all healing effects used on them by 135 for 15 sec.

14891.name: Smelt Dark Iron
14891.text: Allows the miner to smelt chunks of dark iron ore into a dark iron bar.  Smelting Dark Iron can only be done at the Black Forge in Blackrock Depths.

16153.name: Smelt Thorium
16153.text: Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of thorium ore into a thorium bar.  Smelting thorium requires a forge.

17187.name: Transmute: Arcanite
17187.text: Turns a bar of Thorium and an Arcane Crystal into Arcanite.

17563.name: Transmute: Undeath to Water
17563.text: Purifies Essence of Undeath turning it into Water.

17564.name: Transmute: Water to Undeath
17564.text: Taints Essence of Water turning it into Undeath.

18560.name: Mooncloth
18560.text: The purification of tainted Felcloth into Mooncloth can only be done at a moonwell, and only ocassionally will the waters permit themselves to be used in such a way.

19669.name: Arcanite Skeleton Key
19669.text: Allows opening of hard locks.  The skeleton key is consumed in the process.

23787.name: Powerful Anti-Venom
23787.text: Creates a Vial of Powerful Anti-Venom.

25146.name: Transmute: Elemental Fire
25146.text: Transmutes a Heart of Fire into three Elemental Fires.

25347.name: Deadly Poison V
25347.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy for 136 Nature damage over 12 sec.  Stacks up to 5 times on a single target.  105 charges.

45451.name: Smelt Dreamsteel
45451.text: Allows the miner to smelt a dreamsteel bar. Smelting dreamsteel requires a forge.

45611.name: Agitating Poison
45611.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.\nEach strike has a 20% chance of poisoning the enemy which instantly inflicts 67 to 85 Nature damage, and causes additional threat.  115 charges.

45878.name: Dissolvent Poison
45878.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 60 minutes.\nEach strike has a 20% chance to poison the enemy, instantly inflicting 88 to 113 damage. This damage ignores armor. 100 charges.

45882.name: Dissolvent Poison II
45882.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 60 minutes.\nEach strike has a 20% chance to poison the enemy, instantly inflicting 106 to 142 damage. This damage ignores armor. 115 charges.

46072.name: Traveler's Tent
46072.text: Sets up a traveler's tent. While under the cover of the tent you are resting and may gain rested experience. Can only be used outdoors.

46073.name: Fishing Boat
46073.text: Sets up a fishing boat. While on your boat you gain +50 fishing skill. Can only be used outdoors near a deep enough body of water.

46074.name: Simple Wooden Planter
46074.text: Sets up a simple wooden planter. Planters allow you to plant seeds and cultivate crops.

51924.name: Corrosive Poison
51924.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 60 minutes. \nEach strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy for 100 damage over 12 sec.  Stacks up to 5 times on a single target.  105 charges.

52576.name: Corrosive Poison II
52576.text: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 60 minutes. \nEach strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy for 128 damage over 12 sec.  Stacks up to 5 times on a single target.  105 charges.

57115.name: Enchanted Armor Kit
57115.text: Permanently increase the intellect by 8 and spell power by 6 of an item worn on the chest, legs, hands or feet.  Only usable on items level 60 and above.

57555.name: Transmute: Elemental Earth
57555.text: Transmutes a Heart of Fire into three Elemental Earth.

57557.name: Transmute: Elemental Water
57557.text: Transmutes a Globe of Water into three Elemental Water.
